sample-seconds.tooltip: How often the desklet should sample network counters.

preferred-interface.tooltip: Interface name such as enp3s0 or wlo1. Used when selection mode is Preferred interface.

include-tunnel-interfaces.description: Include VPN and tunnel interfaces in auto selection
include-tunnel-interfaces.tooltip: Allow auto-detection to choose VPN interfaces such as tun0 or wg0 as the primary interface. VPN rows are shown by default unless you explicitly filter visible interfaces.

visible-interfaces.tooltip: Comma-separated interface names. Leave blank to show all automatically discovered interfaces.

show-group-all.tooltip: Display the aggregate row for the currently visible interfaces.

show-labels.tooltip: Display labels such as RX, TX, Total RX, and Total TX.

show-totals.tooltip: Display cumulative RX and TX totals for each visible row.

font-scale.tooltip: Scale the desklet text without changing the desklet size.

row-spacing.tooltip: Adjust the space between interface rows.

show-interface-inventory.tooltip: Display the discovered interfaces and their current state below the desklet rows.

show-sparklines.tooltip: Display history charts for RX and TX below each row.

history-length.tooltip: How many samples should be retained for each sparkline.

show-header.tooltip: Display the desklet title above the content.
